skill.name: rollinggo-searchhotel
skill.description: 使用 RollingGo CLI 查询酒店信息、筛选结果、读取酒店标签和获取房型价格。当用户需要按目的地 / 日期 / 星级 / 预算 / 标签 / 距离搜索酒店、查看酒店详情与房型报价，或读取酒店标签库时触发本技能。触发短语——"搜索酒店"、"查酒店"、"酒店详情"、"房型价格"、"酒店标签"、"附近酒店"、"rollinggo"。
skill.summary: 使用 RollingGo CLI 查询酒店信息、筛选结果、读取酒店标签和获取房型价格
skill.author: RollingGo-AI

security_audit.summary: All 252 static findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate hotel search CLI wrapper that executes documented RollingGo CLI commands. External command patterns flagged are markdown documentation strings, not executable code. API key access is expected and used only for official RollingGo API authentication. No malicious intent or data exfiltration detected.

low_findings.title: External Command Execution via CLI Tool
low_findings.description: The skill executes external CLI commands (rollinggo) to query hotel data. This is legitimate tool usage for a hotel search API wrapper. Commands are hardcoded CLI invocations with user-provided arguments (search queries, dates, hotel IDs) passed as parameters to the rollinggo CLI tool.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern flagged as 'external_commands' but these are documented CLI tool invocations in markdown files. No actual command injection vectors exist. The skill wraps a legitimate hotel search API.

content.value_statement: Finding the right hotel for your trip can be time-consuming with manual research. This skill automates hotel searches using the RollingGo API, letting you quickly filter by location, price, star rating, amenities, and more.
actual_capabilities: Search hotels by destination, landmark, airport, or address with natural language queries
Filter results by check-in/out dates, number of guests, star rating, price range, and distance
Search by hotel tags and brands (breakfast included, family-friendly, Marriott, etc.)
Get detailed room types, real-time prices, and cancellation policies for specific hotels
Retrieve available hotel tags for advanced filtering
Provide booking URLs and hotel detail page links for direct reservation
limitations: Requires a valid RollingGo_API_KEY for authentication
Limited to hotel search; does not support flights, trains, airport transfers, or car rentals
Rate limits depend on the RollingGo API subscription tier

use_cases.title: Trip Planner Research
use_cases.description: Quickly find hotels near a specific landmark like Disneyland or a city center with filtering options for budget, star rating, and amenities.

use_cases.title: Business Travel Booking
use_cases.description: Search for hotels near meeting venues or conference centers with specific requirements like WiFi, workspace, and business amenities.

use_cases.title: Family Vacation Planning
use_cases.description: Find family-friendly hotels with kid-friendly facilities, multiple bedrooms, and proximity to attractions using tag-based filtering.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Hotel Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Find hotels near Tokyo Disneyland for a family of 2 adults and 2 children, check-in April 15, 2 nights, budget under 800 yuan per night.
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple hotel search with dates and budget

prompt_templates.title: Filtered Search by Star Rating
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for 4-5 star hotels in Shanghai city center, check-in May 1, stay 3 nights, 2 adults.

prompt_templates.title: Tag-Based Hotel Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Find hotels with 'breakfast included' and 'family-friendly' tags near Beijing Airport, any dates this month, 2 adults.

prompt_templates.title: Hotel Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for hotels near Tokyo Tower, get details on the top 3 results with room types and prices, then compare them.

output_examples.input: Find 4-5 star hotels near Tokyo Disneyland for 2 adults, check-in April 20, 2 nights
output_examples.output:
Found 3 hotels matching your criteria:

1. Tokyo Disneyland Hotel (5 stars)
   - Distance: 500m from Disneyland
   - Price: ¥2,800/night
   - Tags: Family-friendly, Breakfast included

2. Sheraton Grande Tokyo Bay (5 stars)
   - Distance: 1.2km from Disneyland
   - Price: ¥1,850/night
   - Tags: Pool, Family-friendly

3. Hilton Tokyo Bay (5 stars)
   - Distance: 1.5km from Disneyland
   - Price: ¥1,600/night
   - Tags: Family-friendly, Theme park shuttle

output_examples.input: What room types are available at Tokyo Disneyland Hotel for April 20-22?
output_examples.output:
Room types at Tokyo Disneyland Hotel:

- Deluxe Room (¥5,600/night): 35㎡, city view, max 4 guests
- Premium Room (¥6,800/night): 40㎡, park view, max 4 guests
- Themed Suite (¥12,000/night): 60㎡, Disneyland view, max 4 guests

Cancellation: Free cancellation until April 19, 2026

best_practices: Always specify destination type (city, landmark, airport, address) for accurate results
Use the hotel-tags command first to get valid tag strings before filtering by tags
Start with broad search criteria and narrow down based on results
anti_patterns: Do not ask for non-hotel bookings like flights or trains; this skill only supports hotels
Do not skip the hotel-tags step when using tag filtering; use exact tag strings from the API
Do not use --format table for hotel-detail or hotel-tags commands; only search-hotels supports table format

faq.question: How do I get an API key for RollingGo?
faq.answer: Apply for a key at https://mcp.agentichotel.cn/apply. The key can be passed via --api-key parameter or set as RollingGo_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: Can I search for hotels without specific dates?
faq.answer: Yes, you can search without dates, but adding check-in/out dates helps get accurate pricing and availability information.

faq.question: What is the difference between --required-tag and --preferred-tag?
faq.answer: --required-tag ensures only hotels with that tag appear in results, while --preferred-tag ranks hotels with that tag higher but includes others.

faq.question: How do I compare multiple hotels?
faq.answer: First search for hotels, extract their hotelIds, then run hotel-detail for each ID to get room types and prices for comparison.

faq.question: What should I do if no hotels are found?
faq.answer: Try removing filters gradually: remove star ratings, increase distance, or remove tag requirements. The skill includes a fallback strategy.

faq.question: Can I book hotels directly through this skill?
faq.answer: The skill provides booking URLs and hotel detail links in the results. You can guide users to click these links to complete booking on the hotel's website.
